mapper.sql: scenic_id, scenic_name, city, address, longitude, latitude, description, open_time, ticket_price, recommend_level, cover_image, images, tags, view_count, status, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_scenic WHERE status = 1 AND city = #{city} ORDER BY recommend_level DESC, view_count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_scenic SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE scenic_id = #{scenicId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_scenic (scenic_name, city, address, longitude, latitude, description, open_time, ticket_price, recommend_level, cover_image, images, tags) VALUES (#{scenicName}, #{city}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{description}, #{openTime}, #{ticketPrice}, #{recommendLevel}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{tags})
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_scenic SET status = 0 WHERE scenic_id = #{scenicId}
